chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.68 of 2022 Ghulam Rasool Versus Learned VIth Additional District & Sessions Judge Central at Karachi & another DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3023/2022 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 29.04.2024 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Since last two dates Mr. Abdullah Narejo, Advocate for appellant is not appearing. On 16.11.2022 Mr. Khadim Hussain held his brief followed by an order of 18.12.2023. Today is a third date when counsel is called absent and there is no intimation either. The appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
